name: Pollo Raphael
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts (boned, skinned and split)
2 cups Zucchini, cut into 1-inch cubes (about 1 medium zucchini)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomato sauce, picante sauce, cumin, garlic salt, and oregano in a bowl; mix well.
2. Cut chicken into 1-inch pieces; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Cook chicken and onions in oil in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring frequently, until chicken is lightly browned and almost cooked through, about 5 to 7 minutes.
4. Stir tomato sauce mixture into the skillet; mix well. Add zucchini.
5. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Uncover and cook, stirring, about 1 minute to thicken the sauce, if necessary.
7. Serve with additional picante sauce. Serves 4.
